description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular mobile phone with a metallic silver frame and a glass front display. The front features a black-bordered touchscreen with a circular home button at the bottom and a speaker grille above the display. The back is finished in matte silver with a prominent black Apple logo centered and a small camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible physical buttons for volume and mute on the left edge and a power button on the right. The phone's design is sleek and minimalist, with precise cutouts and a slim profile. The overall appearance is modern and premium, typical of Apple's iPhone series.
description: A slim, silver mobile phone with a glass touchscreen front, metallic sides, and a matte silver back featuring an Apple logo and camera. The design is sleek, minimalist, and premium.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass touchscreen, black bezel, circular home button, and speaker grille above the display.
description_view_1: Right edge view displaying the slim metallic profile and the power button near the top.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the matte silver finish, centered black Apple logo, and camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Left edge view showing the slim metallic profile, volume buttons, and mute switch.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the matte silver surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading 6:00, the date 'Friday, March 17', and a green-blue ocean wave wallpaper. The status bar shows signal, carrier 'Virgin', and battery icons.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with a small flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: There is a circular home button below the front display, a power button on the right edge near the top, and two circular volume buttons with a mute switch on the left edge.
